positive: A mystical constellation forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and celestial fauna. The central composition shows intricate, swirling mandalas integrated into the roots of massive, stylized trees. Incorporate glowing cosmic nebula patterns (deep indigo, emerald green, electric violet) weaving through delicate, geometrically patterned leaves and glowing motes of light. The style should be highly detailed neo-art Nouveau mixed with vaporwave luminescence, achieving a strong, crisp silhouette suitable for textile printing. Use radial symmetry and strong, high-contrast glowing highlights against deep, velvety black and sapphire blue backgrounds. Ultra-clean line work, vector illustration quality, 8K resolution, perfect composition for apparel print.
